title: Intense Bouncy Filipino Chocolate Menudo
description: A unique and tangy Filipino dish featuring dark chocolate and a bouncy texture, made with satvik-friendly ingredients and a fermentation process.
instructions: Cut the tofu into small cubes and set aside.
Melt the dark chocolate in a double boiler and set aside.
In a large pot, combine the vinegar, water, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Add the garlic, onion, and tomato paste to the pot and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the tofu to the pot and simmer for another 10 minutes.
Stir in the melted dark chocolate and continue to simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool to room temperature.
Cover the pot and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the menudo chilled, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
